gemini.setupHelp: Gemini is the default provider. Paste a Google AI Studio or Vertex-backed Gemini key here.
gemini.capabilitySummary: Streaming, function calling, system instructions, vision, JSON mode

openai.setupHelp: Use an OpenAI API key if you want GPT models available in `/switch` and the TUI.
openai.capabilitySummary: Streaming, function calling, system instructions, JSON mode, vision on GPT-5/GPT-4.1-class models

anthropic.setupHelp: Anthropic powers Claude models. Saving here keeps the key available for later provider switches.
anthropic.capabilitySummary: Streaming, function calling, system instructions, vision

ollama.setupHelp: Optional. Ollama runs locally and does not usually require an API key.
ollama.capabilitySummary: Streaming, system instructions, JSON mode, optional function calling for capable local models
